Petition For Order: 1. Compellling Kenneth Butler And Horace Butler To Account; 2. For Surchages Against Trustee For Breach Of Fiduciary Duties; 3. Pe
Off Calendar Sep-11-2017 Continued To Nov-15-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: David Simon for and with Jamesse Bailey Lincoln and for Demarco Hill (Petitioners).
Jack Praetzellis for Ken Butler and Wendy Butler.
Nelson Goodell for Horace Butler.

The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than October 31, 2017. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by November 6, 2017. The Petition for Order Compelling Kenneth Butler and Horace Butler to Account, etc. is continued to and the Parties are to return on November 15, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
